hero.sub: Second Brain organises your knowledge into Projects, Areas, Resources and Archives — so you find anything, forget nothing, and focus on what moves the needle.
hero.footnote: No credit card required · Works with WhatsApp

pain.label: The problem
pain.headline: Your inbox is a graveyard. Your notes are forgotten the moment you write them.
pain.body: Bookmarks, meeting notes, article highlights, WhatsApp voice messages — scattered across a dozen apps with no structure. You save everything and find nothing.
pain.stat1Label: of work time spent searching for information
pain.stat2Label: apps the average knowledge worker uses for notes
pain.stat3Label: of saved notes never referenced again

para.label: The solution
para.headline: One system. Four buckets. Everything in its place.
para.sub: The PARA method, created by Tiago Forte, is the simplest organising framework for knowledge workers. Second Brain is your dedicated app for it.
para.pDesc: Active work with a deadline. Track progress, notes and tasks in one place.
para.aDesc: Ongoing responsibilities with no end date — health, finances, team management.
para.rDesc: Topics and reference material you want to keep — books, articles, research.
para.arDesc: Completed or inactive items. Out of sight, never out of reach.

features.label: Features
features.headline: Everything your second brain needs
features.f1Desc: Each project gets its own board. Drag tasks between stages, attach notes, and keep your work moving — no extra tool required.
features.f2Title: A rich editor that gets out of your way
features.f2Desc: Block-based editor with headings, checklists, code blocks and more. Write fast, link notes together, find everything with full-text search.
features.f3Desc: Save articles, books, podcasts and references directly into your resource library. Tag, annotate and retrieve with ease.

whatsapp.headline: Send a voice note. It lands in your Inbox.
whatsapp.body: Connect your WhatsApp to Second Brain. Every message you forward — text, voice, link or image — is transcribed and saved to your Inbox, ready to file into PARA.

cta.headline: Your second brain is one click away.
cta.sub: Join early adopters building a quieter, more organised knowledge practice.
